name: recon-fatal
summary: Recon Fatal is a small authorized reconnaissance helper for **web applications only**.

documentation.readme: Recon Fatal is a small authorized reconnaissance helper for web applications only.
usage_sections: Usage: Basic web-app recon: Scan a specific app URL: Custom subdomains and web ports: Use a wordlist: Save JSON output: Print only the compact report summary: Run Nmap service detection against the root target: Run a TCP SYN scan and Nmap vulnerability scripts: Include resolved subdomai

arguments.name: --max-body
arguments.description: Maximum response bytes to read per request, default: 65536

arguments.name: --nmap
arguments.description: Run an optional Nmap service scan against the root target

arguments.name: --nmap-include-subdomains
arguments.description: Include resolved subdomains in Nmap scope

arguments.name: --nmap-ports
arguments.description: Nmap ports/ranges, default: focused common service ports

arguments.name: --nmap-stealth
arguments.description: Use Nmap TCP SYN scan (-sS); may require admin/root

arguments.name: --nmap-vuln
arguments.description: Run Nmap vuln NSE scripts; implies --nmap

arguments.name: --no-root
arguments.description: Do not include the root domain as a web host candidate

arguments.name: --summary
arguments.description: Print only a compact report summary

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: File containing subdomain labels, one per line

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --interface
arguments.description: Network interface to bind to (e.g. wlan0mon, eth0).

arguments.name: --verbose
arguments.description: Increase log verbosity (repeatable for higher levels).

function_signatures.name: enumerate_subdomains
function_signatures.signature: def enumerate_subdomains(domain: str, words: Iterable[str], timeout: float, workers: int)

function_signatures.name: query_dns_record
function_signatures.signature: def query_dns_record(domain: str, query_type: str, timeout: float)

function_signatures.name: candidate_urls
function_signatures.signature: def candidate_urls(hosts: list[str], ports: list[int], base_url: str | None, https_only: bool, http_only: bool)

function_signatures.name: fetch_url
function_signatures.signature: def fetch_url(url: str, timeout: float, max_body: int, max_redirects: int)

function_signatures.name: build_web_result
function_signatures.signature:
def build_web_result(original_url: str,
    final_url: str,
    status: int,
    reason: str,
    headers,  # noqa: ANN001
    body: bytes,
    redirects: list[str],)

function_signatures.name: fetch_path
function_signatures.signature: def fetch_path(base_url: str, path: str, timeout: float, max_body: int)

function_signatures.name: inspect_tls
function_signatures.signature: def inspect_tls(host: str, port: int, timeout: float)

examples: target                  Domain or URL, such as example.com or $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with thewhiteh4t/seeker (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with iojw/socialscan (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with devanshbatham/ParamSpider (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web] in the OSINT category. Fits when the engagement needs: Recon Fatal is a small authorized reconnaissance helper for **web applications only**.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Recon Fatal is a small authorized reconnaissance helper for web applications only.
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `python .\recon_combo.py example.com`. Further invocations from upstream: `python .\recon_combo.py $KFIOSA_TARGET_URL --https-only`; `python .\recon_combo.py example.com --subdomains www,app,api,staging --ports 80,443,8080,8443`. Recon Fatal is a small authorized reconnaissance helper for web applications only.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.
